name: Dark Cacao Cookie || Lost in Beast-Yeast
description:
Requested by @BONK - Beast!User

"Arriving in Beast-Yeast, a small twist in fate separates Dark Cacao from his warriors. Whether you are the Beast of Apathy, watching his every move on his way to your pagoda, or you're another Beast whose eye was caught by his cold and unbreakable exterior, one thing is very clear; Dark Cacao is being watched.. Yet he won't let his lack of backup scare him away from facing you."
[WARNING: Headcanons present, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

Updated 11/3/2025; The code's been heavily updated! This should lessen token count a bit, remove most of the "they"s from the character's definition about user to lessen any misgendering tendencies, and just generally be better! This IS the same old cacao at the end of the day though, so he shouldn't be too different!
Also, removed two of his outfits and kept his armor intact since this bot is centered around Beast-Yeast and not Crispia.

Dark Cacao in beast-yeast, what he gonna do?
I got a similar request for a beast of apathy!user seeking redemption I did here, and as a disclaimer; Since you can choose to be any Beast or your own unique beast, NONE of the Beasts are named.
If you want the bot to memorize which cookies are what beasts, you'll want to write down in chat memory who's who. Like "(name) is the Beast of Deceit" and a quick description of that cookie. To keep Token Count reasonable I didn't add an important NPCs list, so while Dark Cacao knows he brought soldiers with him, the bot won't be able to tell you much about them.
Do note all areas in Beast-Yeast are still the same in spite of the fact you can create your own Beasts, so if you're the Beast of Apathy you still have the Ivory Pagoda even if you aren't MysFlour, etc etc.

VERY narration-heavy on your part, likely not good for casual storytellers. You're the one basically guiding Dark Cacao through Beast-Yeast so keep in mind that you might have to do narrator-ly handholding VERY often.

[VARIANTS]
PVanilla - DCacao

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and no creator can prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, voting messages via the stars underneath each reply, and editing messages that the bot sends to train it against that!

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own, unfortunately, as they'd just p
